gaps: No existing test case covers charging notifications for Free20 earbuds on iOS.
No existing test case covers the scenario where one earbud is worn and the other is placed in the open charging case.
No existing test case covers repeated/duplicate charging notifications.
No existing test case covers Free20 earbud behavior with build 53 or 54 on iOS.
All existing test cases focus on onboarding, EULA, location permissions, and splash screen - none relate to earbud charging notifications.

generated_testcases.title: Verify no repeated charging notification when one Free20 earbud is worn and other is in open charging case on iOS
steps: 1. Launch the app on an iOS device (build 53 or 54).
2. Ensure Bluetooth is enabled and the Free20 earbuds are paired.
3. Wear one Free20 earbud (e.g., left) and confirm it is connected and playing audio.
4. Place the other Free20 earbud (e.g., right) into the open charging case.
5. Observe the notification area on the iOS device for any charging-related notifications.
6. Wait for 30 seconds and continue observing for any repeated or duplicate charging notifications.
7. Remove the earbud from the charging case and place it back in again.
8. Observe the notification area again for any repeated or duplicate charging notifications.
generated_testcases.expected: No repeated or duplicate charging notifications appear on the iOS device when one Free20 earbud is worn and the other is placed in the open charging case. A single charging notification may appear once but must not repeat or duplicate.

generated_testcases.title: Verify charging notification appears only once when Free20 earbud is placed in open charging case while other is worn on iOS
steps: 1. Launch the app on an iOS device (build 53 or 54).
2. Ensure Bluetooth is enabled and the Free20 earbuds are paired and connected.
3. Wear the left Free20 earbud and confirm it is actively connected.
4. Place the right Free20 earbud into the open charging case.
5. Observe the iOS notification center for a charging notification.
6. Dismiss the notification if it appears.
7. Wait 10 seconds and check if the same charging notification reappears.
8. Repeat steps 5-7 for a total of 3 cycles.
generated_testcases.expected: A charging notification may appear once when the earbud is placed in the case, but it must not reappear or duplicate after being dismissed. No repeated notifications should be observed.

generated_testcases.title: Verify no duplicate charging notifications when swapping worn Free20 earbud on iOS
steps: 1. Launch the app on an iOS device (build 53 or 54).
2. Ensure Bluetooth is enabled and the Free20 earbuds are paired.
3. Wear the left Free20 earbud and place the right earbud in the open charging case.
4. Observe and note any charging notifications.
5. After 10 seconds, remove the left earbud from your ear and place it in the charging case.
6. Remove the right earbud from the charging case and wear it.
7. Observe the notification area for any charging notifications.
8. Repeat steps 3-7 two more times, alternating which earbud is worn.
generated_testcases.expected: Each time an earbud is placed in the charging case, at most one charging notification should appear. No duplicate or repeated notifications for the same earbud placement event should occur.

generated_testcases.title: Verify charging notification behavior when both Free20 earbuds are placed in open charging case on iOS
steps: 1. Launch the app on an iOS device (build 53 or 54).
2. Ensure Bluetooth is enabled and the Free20 earbuds are paired and connected.
3. Wear both Free20 earbuds and confirm audio playback.
4. Remove both earbuds and place them simultaneously into the open charging case.
5. Observe the notification area for charging notifications.
6. Wait 30 seconds and check for any repeated or duplicate notifications.
7. Remove both earbuds from the case, wear them again, then place them back in the case one at a time (left first, then right after 5 seconds).
8. Observe the notification area for charging notifications.
generated_testcases.expected: When both earbuds are placed in the charging case simultaneously, at most one charging notification should appear. When placed one at a time, at most two notifications may appear (one per earbud), but no duplicate or repeated notifications should occur for the same earbud.

generated_testcases.title: Verify charging notification does not appear when Free20 earbud is removed from open charging case on iOS
steps: 1. Launch the app on an iOS device (build 53 or 54).
2. Ensure Bluetooth is enabled and the Free20 earbuds are paired.
3. Place one Free20 earbud in the open charging case (with the other already worn).
4. Observe that a charging notification may appear.
5. After 10 seconds, remove the earbud from the charging case.
6. Observe the notification area for any new notifications.
7. Wait 15 seconds and check again for any notifications.
generated_testcases.expected: No charging notification should appear when an earbud is removed from the charging case. Notifications should only trigger when an earbud is placed into the case, not when removed.
